selfHostedDescription: You are running a self-hosted instance of OpenToggl. All features are included at no cost for {{organizationName}}.
whatsIncludedDescription: Every feature is available on your self-hosted instance with no usage limits.
opentogglDescription: OpenToggl is the open-source, self-hosted alternative to Toggl Track. Your time tracking data stays on your own infrastructure with full control over privacy, backups, and customization. No subscriptions, no per-seat fees, no usage caps.
